overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a desert shantytown market at golden hour, passing vendors and stalls, then continuing through open desert toward a tunnel with the Night City skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert shantytown entrance path between corrugated metal shacks

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path between weathered corrugated metal shacks toward a distant market area

entered.detail: weathered corrugated metal shack with graffiti on the side
tall wooden watchtower with elevated platform
large metal electrical transmission tower against the sky
reddish-brown rocky cliff formation in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a narrow desert shantytown path. Corrugated metal shacks line the left side while a wooden watchtower stands in the distance on the right. The ground is sandy dirt with sparse vegetation, and the warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market stalls with vendor booths

events.description: passing under a bright green neon sign illuminating a food vendor stall
moving deeper into the market area with denser vendor stalls and merchandise displays

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow market passage between clothing racks and food stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall with bright green neon lighting
person browsing through hanging clothes at a market stall

entered.detail: market stall with clothing items hanging on display under a canopy
food kiosk with bright green neon lighting and red signage
scattered red and white plastic chairs and tables

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered market area with vendor stalls on both sides. A food stall with bright green neon lighting dominates the center while clothing racks line the left. NPC vendors and shoppers populate the space, and the ground is littered with cardboard boxes and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert edge transition zone with distant city view

events.description: exiting the covered market area into open desert with the Night City skyline becoming visible
turning right to pass the final market stall and enter open terrain

agents.ego_description: leaving the market area and walking past the last vendor stalls into open desert terrain

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting at a stall with a striped zebra-pattern awning

entered.detail: market stall with distinctive black and white striped fabric awning
distant futuristic city skyline with tall buildings visible on the horizon
old white refrigerator unit sitting outside a stall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera exits the market, revealing a wide desert landscape with the Night City skyline visible in the distance. The last market stall with a striped awning sits on the right, and plastic chairs are scattered across the sandy ground. The lighting remains warm golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland approaching railway tunnel

events.description: approaching a concrete railway tunnel entrance carved into the rock hillside

agents.ego_description: walking across open desert terrain toward a tunnel with the city skyline growing larger in the background

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance carved into the red rock hillside with railway tracks leading inside
metal railway tracks running through the desert toward the tunnel
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through open desert wasteland with sparse vegetation and scattered rocks. The Night City skyline becomes more prominent on the right. A concrete railway tunnel entrance appears carved into the rocky hillside ahead, with tracks leading into the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway tunnel under desert hill transitioning to open desert

events.description: entering the dark concrete railway tunnel
exiting the tunnel back into bright golden hour sunlight
large holographic billboard becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: passing through the dark tunnel and continuing toward the distant city buildings

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel interior with railway tracks running through
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade
large floating holographic billboard with bright pink and blue colors

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark concrete tunnel, briefly obscuring the sky, then exits back into the bright desert sunlight. A massive holographic advertisement floats in the air on the right, and modern skyscrapers of Night City dominate the horizon ahead. The terrain remains sandy with scattered desert vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped desert shantytown into the expansive wasteland bordering a futuristic metropolis. It begins by navigating a narrow sandy path lined with corrugated metal shacks and a distant wooden watchtower under the warm glow of golden hour. As the camera moves forward, the path tightens into a semi-covered market filled with clothing racks, debris, and a food stall illuminated by bright green neon. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the market past a striped awning and scattered plastic chairs, revealing a wide desert landscape with the Night City skyline appearing on the horizon. Finally, the camera traverses the rocky wasteland and passes through a dark concrete railway tunnel before emerging back into the sunlight to face a massive floating holographic advertisement and the towering skyscrapers of the city.
